AboutBlogContactHomeTestimonials

Services

Individual and Group Lessons

One on one or a lesson with your group. If not in person, video and voice call for proper feedback and instruction!

Professional Play

Hire me to play bridge with you as your partner or as a teammate. Includes a post session hand review!

Bridge (or other games) + Babysitting

Looking for some you time? I can entertain your kids and teach them bridge (if that’s what you want), or other games, or even homework! I am located around the peninsula area south of San Francisco in California.

Contact me below for details and rates.
